textByHash.befba4dc01164f70fe6f111673ac6e5d1bcd2ceb: Hello traveller. How can I be of assistance?
textByHash.b4798d55fc3225fb5a42ac106b845d1e26bfcff2: You'd be better off speaking to one of the nurses.
textByHash.9e815192d27282f1c51e16195c6de500fb62bfbe: Well don't tell anyone but I came here because of the nurses!
textByHash.5d1b73b4cb43a2394cedf4a436c3891607d1a10e: It beats being stuck in the monastery!
textByHash.e487739dacaa935073140f4198dfb3a41a0fdce3: I belong to the monastery north of Falador.
textByHash.6642072e46a399fbdd5f2cdc1d5360302dfd417e: I'm sorry, I'm under orders from the guards to not let you leave right now.
textByHash.2ef9bed47d2b49c818609c2b57dfa8a2e186b7bc: Hello! Please complete this for me!
textByHash.4bbafe3dd9580cce8a26bf91e9fa8f185f7b7122: I'm afraid that the puzzle is wrong.
